user.title: Tesla Account
user.description: Enter your Tesla account email address.

auth.title: Tesla Authentication
auth.description:
**Step 1:** Open the following link in your browser and sign in with your Tesla account:

[Open Tesla Login]({auth_url})

**Step 2:** After login you will be redirected to a blank page.

**Step 3:** Copy the full callback address from the browser address bar (including parameter `code=...`) and paste it below.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please try again with a new URL.
error.no_vehicles: No vehicles found in Tesla account.
